title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Question: A resistive DC load receives pulse-width modulated (PWM) power from a controller circuit, and an oscilloscope shows the load voltage waveform as such shown in the image. Calculate the average power dissipated by the load, assuming a load resistance of 1.8Ω, as shown in the figure. The average power dissipated by the load is ______W.

title: EEE-Bench subquestion 1
rewritten_question_text: For the shown operational amplifier circuit and a given input \( v_i \), what is the positive saturation level of the output?

title: EEE-Bench subquestion 2
rewritten_question_text: For the shown operational amplifier circuit and a given input \( v_i \), what is the negative saturation level of the output?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text:
In the , the unit step response \( y(t) \) of a unity feedback system with open loop transfer function 

\[
G(s)H(s) = \frac{K}{(s+1)^2(s+2)}
\]

is shown. The value of \( K \) is ______ .

title: EEE-Bench open question
rewritten_question_text: From the given K-map of a Boolean function of five variables \(P, Q, R, S,\) and \(X\), determine the minimum sum-of-products (SOP) expression for the function.

title: EEE-Bench Open Question
rewritten_question_text: The voltages of the three electrodes of a silicon transistor measured with a multimeter are shown in the figure. Determine the operating state of the transistor.

title: EEE-Bench Open-Ended
rewritten_question_text: Based on the shown waveforms of the binary symbols \( s_1(t) \) and \( s_2(t) \) at the receiver input, and assuming the input Gaussian white noise has power spectral density \( n_0/2 \), determine the probability of error \( P_{\mathrm{e}} \).

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Question: In the circuit shown in figure, \( E_1 = 10 \, V \), \( E_2 = 20 \, V \), \( R_1 = 40 \, \Omega \), \( R_2 = 30 \, \Omega \), and \( R_3 = 20 \, \Omega \), then \( U_{ab} = \) ________V.

title: EEE-Bench Open-Ended
rewritten_question_text: A rectangular coil with 110 turns and a certain area is placed in a uniform magnetic field with a specific magnetic induction strength. The coil rotates at a constant angular velocity around an axis perpendicular to the magnetic field, generating a sinusoidal alternating current. As shown in the figure, this alternating current is applied to the input of an ideal transformer, and a small light bulb \(L\), with a rated voltage of 10 V, lights up normally. The resistance of the coil and wires is negligible. Based on the setup shown, the turns ratio of the primary coil to the secondary coil of the ideal transformer is ____.

title: EEE-Bench 子题 1
rewritten_question_text:
A binary random variable \( X \) takes the value of 1 with probability \( \frac{1}{3} \). \( X \) is input to a cascade of 2 independent identical binary symmetric channels (BSCs), each with crossover probability \( \frac{1}{2} \). The output of the BSCs are the random variables \( Y_1 \) and \( Y_2 \) as shown in the . The value of \( H\left(Y_1\right) + H\left(Y_2\right) \) in bits is
请只回答第 1 个目标量。
